_comment: Example Claude Code hooks for PM Skills. Merge the `hooks` block into your ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json in a project). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH with where you cloned this repo. All hooks are best-effort and non-blocking; session-brief.sh is the only one that writes (an append-only ledger line) — remove it for a strictly read-only set. Docs: hooks/README.md
